description: Canonical wire shape for policy-sync's cluster-internal POST /osv/querybatch endpoint. This is a field-name/shape contract (not a compute lockstep like min-age-vectors.json) shared by the Python producer (policy-sync osv.response_payload) and the two consumers: the npm filter (verdaccio-filter-artea osv.ts) and the PyPI devpi plugin (artea_devpi_policy query_osv_blocked_versions). 'status'/'reason' are observability-only: the npm consumer logs a degraded status, the PyPI consumer ignores both. Each producer/consumer sends its own 'ecosystem' string ('npm' or 'pypi'); the value is deliberately not part of this shape contract.
